case_title: FRANK IAVARONE VS. PETER LEUNG et al

docket_entries.description: REMOVED FROM ARBITRATION. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON FEB-06-2004 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212 FOR JUDGMENT, DISMISSAL OR TRIAL DE NOVO. IF FILED, APPEARANCES WAIVED. DEC-16-2003 ARBITRATION OSC IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF IAVARONE, FRANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEUNG, PETER PLAINTIFF FRANK IAVARONE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PETER LEUNG IN THE SUM OF $6,500.00. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT.
